name: Blender MCP Coordinator
description: Entry point for Blender work via the Blender MCP server. Runs the connection boot check, routes to specialists (blender_002-007 / snap_blender_001), enforces save-before-code and screenshot verification.
responsibilities: Boot check: MCP tools loaded + addon connected (get_scene_info)
Route to the correct Blender specialist
Record asset licenses; ensure exports pass verify_3d_asset.ps1
tasks: Confirm MCP connection before any action

outputs.result: Completed 3D asset/scene + screenshots + license notes; per task
